title: After the Shuka Sho: Witch's Dignity

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho! It's Sweep Tosho! Sweep Tosho
sweeps right to the front!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Sweep Tosho crosses the finish line first!
Sweep Tosho has seized the full glory of the
Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Amazing! Amazing! This is the first time I've seen such a fierce, courageous, and feisty generation of runners!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
And Sweep Tosho beat them all! Did you see how
fast she was going at the end?!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Remember what she was saying? She said she was
going to change the world, change the way things
are. You know, just maybe...

text_block_list.name: Spectator D
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. You know, I think Sweep Tosho might
really be able to pull it off!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: (That was... fun... Really fun! And...)

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(The way the crowd looked at me! Their eyes were
different today! Yeah... my magic's getting
stronger!)

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Aghhh! I lost!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Aha... Yeah. I won!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Wait... Are you crying?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Obviously! I'm upset! Aghhh!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
You know, at first, you really made me mad. I
didn't like the way you acted like you represented
the whole Triple Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you already told me that... So? What about
now?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: Hm... Well, you still make me mad.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: What?! Hold on!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
But I respect you... You were the strongest out of
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text:
So go ahead and be our representative. Get out
there and change the world.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume with Blue Ribbons
text_block_list.text: As the Tiara tour's little witch.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having won the Shuka Sho in spectacular fashion,
Sweep Tosho achieves a result befitting the
representative of the Triple Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she remains as demanding as ever. She
suddenly demands ice cream on our way home, so
we stop for some.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Mmm! ...So, about my next race!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
What? Were you zoning out just then?! Familiar!
That's not allowed!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You have to stay alert! My racing magic's almost
ready, after all.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Back then, I wanted to run in special races to
make my racing magic stronger. And now, look
how far I've come...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
During the Oka Sho, and in the interview after, a
tiny seed was planted. And at the Japanese Oaks,
that seed finally sprouted.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But wow, seeing the other racers get all fired up
was so much fun... My magic even worked on Rob
Roy!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And you saw what happened at the Shuka Sho,
right?! I bet at least half the people who were
there are under my spell now too!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You know, I'm starting to get what makes a race
special.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Like you said, it's important that the race itself is a special one. It's gotta be a race everyone really wants to see.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But I'm pretty sure that a race needs two other
things too!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: One is a special rival! You've gotta have an opponent who's mega pumped, like that girl with the blue ribbons in her hair.
choice_data_list: I see... And what's the other thing?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: The other thing is that I have to be special myself.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Like by being a girl who announces in an
interview that she's gonna cast magic... or a girl
who represents the Triple Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So I'm gonna run in a special race against special
rivals, and I'm gonna be the most special
Umamusume of all!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure that'll make it an ultra fun race,
and then, when all that magical energy is charged
up inside me...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I should definitely be able to cast my magic on
the whole world.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
No, there's no "should" about it! I'm gonna cast
my magic on everyone, and that's that!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
So listen up, Familiar. I'm gonna run in the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Just being this year's Triple Tiara tour
representative isn't enough!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna become even more special—by racing against the senior-year runners who came from the Triple Tiara tour!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Classic year, senior year, none of that stuff
matters to me!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna represent the runners on all the Triple Tiara tours!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho showcases her ambitions with a
series of confident claims.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's times like these when she's more stubborn,
more headstrong, more obstinate...
choice_data_list: All right. Next up is the Queen Elizabeth II Cup!
All right. Next up is the Queen Elizabeth II Cup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...And also more incredible than anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
That's that, then! Okay, time to head back to the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And when we get back, you need to get to work!
You've gotta work super hard for me. ♪
